top_signals.title: US will not win Iran war from the air, Trump’s ex-defence chief warns
top_signals.summary: Mark Esper tells FT more bombing will not change Tehran’s behaviour, as president vows to step up attacks
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: BHP Iron Ore Workers Stage First Hedland Strike Since 2000
top_signals.summary: Workers at BHP Group’s Port Hedland operations in Western Australia staged the first strike at the company’s Pilbara iron ore hub since 2000, after last-ditch talks failed to avert industrial action.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Uber agrees €13bn deal to acquire Delivery Hero
top_signals.summary: German food delivery group will spin off Turkish and some European operations to New York-based SSW Partners

top_signals.title: Prabowo’s favored tycoon wants to become Indonesia’s richest man
top_signals.summary: Entrepreneur Andi Syamsuddin Arsyad's presence increasingly noticed, as President Prabowo Subianto upends the long-understood political pecking order.
